title: Yomiko Black Labrador (Small)
features: Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all!
Black soft boa plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Super soft plush small Black Labrador from Suki Gifts International’s Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Measures at around 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1 x Small Black Labrador See more
